title: The Straw Hats Escape — Part 2
description: Dressrosa’s allies protect Luffy as the crew runs toward departure.
scene: On pages 6–10, Luffy, Rebecca, King Riku, Kyros, Viola deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're never going to be able to see him again, at this rate!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Lucy, I... I got a letter from him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: soldier- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is trying his best to distance him- self from me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He wants to make me a stranger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What? You aren't even my parent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why? Is it because I said such terrible things to him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're just some one-legged toy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Does he detest the thought of living with me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Does he think I'll be a burden?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I have no idea! Think about that stuff yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can't stay in this country any longer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I only came here to ask you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whether you were really okay with the way things turned out?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No! I hate it! How could I ever be okay with this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Then, will you come with me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Rebecca! Straw Hat! Wait just a minute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Lady Rebecca- CA!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Viola- San! I have a favor to ask of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Here we go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Hold on tight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Time to run !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: King Riku- Uuu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Some- thing the matter?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Lady Rebecca has...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Been kidnapped by a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Who? Which pirate!? What kind of pirate!? One of the Colossem entrants!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: S- S- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St- St

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Straw Hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Lady Rebecca has been kidnapped from the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: The culprit is none other than Straw Hat luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: He's definitely gonna ransom her off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: What AAAA AAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Impossible! Lucy has....!? How utterly unexpected!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Well, doesn't matter; I still love ya', you rascal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Stop Talking Out of Your Ass Gatz!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: See!? This is what happens when you trust pirate scum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: and Harbor them in your country!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Hunt down Straw Hat on the double! Save Princess Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: There he is! Special sniper Squad, take your aim and fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Uugh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: My god! The Marine Soldiers have sub-denly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Marine tent

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: The troops have col- lapsed!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: No. C. Marine

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Hao- Shoku!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: No! They are still conscious, it seems!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Well, in any case, they still plan on setting sail from the Eastern Port! Mobile the fleet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Send all Squads east to Carta!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Get that Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: I'd like to see you try!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
